title: Count Strictly Increasing Subarrays
titleCn: 严格递增的子数组个数

detail.title: Count Strictly Increasing Subarrays
hints: Find the number of strictly increasing subarrays that end at a specific index. Can you calculate that for each index from 0 to n - 1?
The answer will be the sum of the number of subarrays that end at each index.
